case_title: MAUNG MYINT YANG VS. JOSHUA RYAN WENDEROTH

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10/20/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "REFUSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SIGNATURE SERVED AUG-31-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WENDEROTH, JOSHUA RYAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MAUNG MYINT YANG. APPEARANCE BY RODNEY WYATT, CLAIMS ADMINISTRATOR FOR GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY ON BEHALF OF NAMED DEFENDANT JOSHUA RYAN WENDEROTH. PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE FOLLOWING: JOSHUA RYAN WENDEROTH IS DELETED/DISMISSED FROM THE CASE. GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT WILL BE ADDED AS THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YANG, MAUNG MYINT AS TO DEFENDANT WENDEROTH, JOSHUA RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, MAUNG MYINT AS TO DEFENDANT WENDEROTH, JOSHUA RYAN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT WENDEROTH, JOSHUA RYAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANG, MAUNG MYINT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HWY AND TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT PARTIES AGREE TO DELETE JOSHUA RYAN WENDEROTH AS DEFENDANT AND TO ADD GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT (JOSHUA RYAN WENDEROTH'S EMPLOYER) AS THE SOLE DEFENDANT AND TO WAIVE SERVICE, NOTICE AND ALL IRREGULARITIES. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE A GOVERNMENT CLAIM AND THE STATUTE RAN ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON FEBRUARY 27, 2016 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
